title: Creeper Fire Charge Fix
description: Fixes MC-257875: Fire charge won't be consumed while igniting a Creeper
body:
This mod fixes [a bug](https://bugs.mojang.com/browse/MC-257875):

Fire charge won't be consumed while igniting a Creeper in survival or adventure mode.

Differently, while igniting a TNT, the fire charge is consumed.

#### Behavior when loading the mod:

The fire charge is consumed.
